subject: feat(theme): implement full dark mode system
body:
User-controlled dark/light mode with system preference fallback,
localStorage persistence, cross-tab sync, and flash prevention.
Follows glow-props CLAUDE.md "Theme & Dark Mode" pattern adapted
to Vue 3 Composition API.

Foundation:
- Semantic CSS variable palette (:root light + .dark dark tokens)
- @custom-variant dark for Tailwind v4 class-based toggling
- color-scheme: dark on html.dark for native form inputs
- useDarkMode.ts composable (singleton, localStorage, matchMedia,
  cross-tab sync via storage event, dynamic meta theme-color)
- Flash prevention inline script in index.html <head>
- Dual <meta name="theme-color"> tags with media queries
- @media print overrides (no-print class, white bg, break-inside)

UI:
- Dark/Light mode toggle in burger menu with Sun/Moon icons
- dark: variants on 30 files (17 components + 8 views + CSS + HTML)
- ApexCharts theme-aware config (axis labels, grid, tooltip, legend)
- HelpDrawer prose styles use semantic CSS variables

Tags: theme, dark-mode, ux, glow-props-sync, css, composable
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: neutral
Epic: dark-mode
Semver: minor
